artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a colossal rusted Ferris wheel turning against a smoky black sky, its spokes strung with sickly neon and hot gold bulbs, swaying gondolas trailing ember sparks and faint dread, never stopping. Tattered striped tents huddle at its base. The towering wheel fills the wide landscape frame, glowing rim near the top. Wide 4:3 landscape, Rakdos carnival red and hot gold, seductive sinister festivity, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Ferris Wheel of the Damned
text: At the beginning of your upkeep, the wheel turns: roll a six-sided die. Ferris Wheel of the Damned deals damage equal to the result to the player to your left, then they get a Treasure token for riding. The ride does not stop. The ride has never stopped.
flavorText: Built in 1903. Inspected never. Riders report a faint screaming that may or may not be the bearings.
